description: Raw elemental power given form as landscape, where the forces that built the world still rage unchecked and untamed.
biomes: The ground is ember and the sky is smoke. Flames leap from cracks in the stone and the heat bends the air into waves.
An endless expanse of living water with no shore in sight. Currents pull in every direction and the surface breathes.
Towering columns of raw stone and veins of ore exposed to the air. The ground pulses like a slow heartbeat beneath your feet.
Nothing solid in any direction. Winds carry you forward and the clouds below are the closest thing to ground.
Bolts strike the ground in constant, crackling barrages. The earth is scorched in branching patterns and the air smells of ozone.
Frozen stillness in every direction, with spires of blue ice rising into a sky that has never seen the sun.
Perpetual thunder rolling across a land lashed by rain and wind. The sky is black and the lightning never stops.
Light bends through mineral-rich air, painting every surface in shifting bands of color. The ground sparkles and the wind hums with resonance.
